title: indigofera caroliniana
intro: Indigofera caroliniana, also known as Carolina snakeroot, is a perennial plant native to the southeastern United States, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Indigofera caroliniana include relief from coughs, colds, and other respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate digestive issues. Indigofera caroliniana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy that has been utilized for centuries in traditional folk medicine.
